allowSpectating.description: configure_spectating: allow players to spectate (default true).

bDelayedStart.description: configure_game_rules: sets AGameMode::bDelayedStart when the property exists on the class.

bPlayerOnly.description: configure_player_start: restrict the PlayerStart to player pawns only.

controllerId.description: add_local_player: controller id for the new local player.

defaultPawnClass.description: create_game_mode: default pawn class path. Alias: pawnClass (set_default_pawn_class).

executeTravel.description: host_lan_server: actually perform ServerTravel instead of just building the URL (default false).

forceRespawn.description: set_respawn_rules: whether respawn is forced rather than optional.

gameModeBlueprint.description: Alias of blueprintPath for GameFramework actions (set_default_pawn_class, set_player_controller_class, set_game_state_class, set_player_state_class, configure_game_rules, setup_match_states, configure_round_system, configure_team_system, configure_scoring_system, configure_spawn_system, set_respawn_rules, configure_spectating, get_game_framework_info).

localPlayerNum.description: mute_player: local player index applying the mute.

location.description: configure_player_start: PlayerStart world location (x, y, z).

mapName.description: host_lan_server: map to travel to when hosting.

minNetUpdateFrequency.description: Minimum update frequency when idle (Hz, default 2).

muted.description: mute_player: mute (true) or unmute (false), default true.

name.description: Asset name (create_game_mode / create_game_state / create_player_controller / create_player_state / create_game_instance / create_hud_class).

netLoadOnClient.description: Net load on client for replication graph.

ownerActorName.description: Name of owner actor (null to clear).

parentClass.description: create_game_mode / create_game_state / create_player_controller / create_player_state / create_game_instance / create_hud_class: parent class path (defaults to the native base class).

path.description: Destination folder for a created asset.

pawnClass.description: set_default_pawn_class: default pawn class path (alias of defaultPawnClass; first present wins).

playerIndex.description: remove_local_player: local player index to remove (cannot be 0).

playerName.description: mute_player: player name to mute/unmute (or use targetPlayerId).

playerStartName.description: configure_player_start: specific PlayerStart actor to configure (falls back to actorName).

playerStartTag.description: configure_player_start: PlayerStartTag to assign (default derived from teamIndex).

respawnDelay.description: configure_spawn_system / set_respawn_rules: seconds before a player respawns (default 5).

respawnLocation.description: set_respawn_rules: named respawn location strategy (default PlayerStart).

rotation.description: configure_player_start: PlayerStart world rotation (pitch, yaw, roll).

save.description: Game framework actions: persist the created/modified asset (or level, for configure_player_start) after applying changes (default false).

serverName.description: host_lan_server: display name for the hosted server.

startPlayersNeeded.description: configure_game_rules: NOT IMPLEMENTED — rejected as an unsupported field (not a native GameMode property, not a generated Blueprint variable).

systemWide.description: mute_player: apply the mute system-wide rather than just locally.

targetPlayerId.description: mute_player: player id to mute/unmute (or use playerName).

teamIndex.description: configure_player_start: team index used to build the default PlayerStartTag.

travelOptions.description: host_lan_server: extra URL options appended to the travel string.

variableName.description: add_network_prediction_data: name for the created replicated variable (default PredictionData_<dataType>).

voiceEnabled.description: enable_voice_chat: enable or disable voice chat.

description: Edit Level Sequences: add tracks, bind actors, set keyframes, control playback, and record camera.

actorNames.description: add_actors: level actor names (label/name/UAID) to bind as possessables; remove_actors: binding names to remove (case-insensitive).

bindingId.description: add_keyframe: sequence binding GUID (alternative to actorName).

className.description: add_spawnable_from_class: class for the new spawnable; a native class name or a /Game Blueprint asset path (its generated class is used).

end.description: set_view_range/set_work_range: range end in seconds (default 10 for view, 0 for work).

endFrame.description: add_section: section end frame (default 100; raw tick-resolution frame number).

floatValue.description: Keyframe value for a float property track.

frame.description: add_keyframe: keyframe frame number at the sequence display rate.

frameRate.description: Frame/display rate in fps: an integer string (e.g. "30"), an exact NTSC rational "numerator/denominator" (e.g. "24000/1001"), or a plain JSON number (rounded to a whole-number rate).

lengthInFrames.description: set_properties: playback-range length in frames from playbackStart (ignored when playbackEnd is given).

locked.description: set_track_locked: true locks all the track's sections, false unlocks them (default true).

muted.description: set_track_muted: true disables evaluation of the track, false re-enables it (default true).

path.description: Level Sequence asset path (alias of assetPath).

playbackEnd.description: set_properties: playback range end (raw tick-resolution frame number; wins over lengthInFrames).

playbackStart.description: set_properties: playback range start (raw tick-resolution frame number, not display-rate frames).

resolution.description: set_tick_resolution: tick resolution as 'numerator/denominator' (e.g. 24000/1001) or a whole number per second; unrecognized formats keep the current resolution.

solo.description: set_track_solo: true solos by disabling evaluation on all other tracks, false re-enables all (default true).

speed.description: set_playback_speed: playback speed multiplier applied to the open Sequencer (default 1; must be > 0).

startFrame.description: add_section: section start frame (default 0; raw tick-resolution frame number).

structValue.description: Keyframe value for a transform track: {location:{x,y,z}, rotation:{roll,pitch,yaw}, scale:{x,y,z}}.

trackName.description: add_section/remove_track/set_track_muted/set_track_solo/set_track_locked: substring matched against track names to pick the target track; add_track: echoed in the response only (the new track is not renamed).

trackType.description: add_track: track class to add; a UMovieSceneTrack class name or short form expanded to MovieScene<Type>Track (e.g. Audio, Event; see list_track_types).

name: manage_sequence

description: Run profiling, set quality/CVars, execute console commands, execute Python scripts, run UBT, and manage widgets.

actors.description: merge_actors: actor names/labels/paths to merge (at least 2).

additionalArgs.description: run_ubt: extra UBT command-line arguments (alias: arguments).

allowModalApis.description: execute_python: opt out of the modal-API guard (reload_packages / *_with_dialog / EditorDialog are blocked by default — a modal dialog permanently freezes a headless editor). Only pass true when the exact call cannot prompt.

arguments.description: run_ubt: alias of additionalArgs, read when additionalArgs is absent.

boostPlayerLocation.description: configure_texture_streaming: boost streaming around the active camera location.

buildId.description: get_build_status: buildId from run_ubt (default: most recent build this session). Returns status running|succeeded|failed, [N/M] progress, parsed errors, warningCount, resultLine, logPath.

category.description: get_log/tail_log: case-insensitive substring filter on the log category name (e.g. 'LogTemp'); spawn_category: alias of categoryName, read when categoryName is absent; get_project_settings: accepted but ignored.

categoryName.description: spawn_category: gameplay debugger category name (falls back to 'category' if absent).

channels.description: start_session: comma-separated Unreal Insights trace channel list passed to 'Trace.Start' (omit to start with default channels).

className.description: generate_test_stub: C++ class symbol (default derived from testName, e.g. FCombatDamageAppliesTest).

command.description: execute_command: console command line executed via the editor/engine Exec path (security blocklist applies).

contains.description: get_log/tail_log: case-insensitive substring the message must contain.

count.description: get_log/tail_log: max lines to return (default 100, max 2000).

detailed.description: generate_memory_report: emit the full/verbose report (memreport -full) instead of the summary.

duration.description: run_benchmark: seconds to run before completing (default 60).

filter.description: Substring filter over automation test display name / full path / test name (run_tests, list_tests).

flagsExpr.description: generate_test_stub: override the EAutomationTestFlags expression (default EditorContext | EngineFilter).

forceRecompile.description: optimize_shaders: recompile all shaders regardless of mode.

instancing.description: optimize_draw_calls: enable dynamic mesh draw command instancing.

key.description: set_cvar: console variable name (e.g. r.ScreenPercentage); set_project_setting: config key within the section.

maxTests.description: Max tests to queue for run_tests (1-500, default 50).

noUBA.description: run_ubt: pass -NoUBA (default true — UBA-built binaries break later Live Coding patches). Set false for faster UBA builds when no LC patching will follow.

outputPath.description: generate_test_stub: .cpp path to write (default: the bridge plugin's GeneratedTests dir).

overwrite.description: generate_test_stub: replace the file if it already exists (default false).

packageName.description: merge_actors: destination package path for the merged static mesh (alias: outputPath).

replaceSourceActors.description: merge_actors: destroy the source actors once the merge succeeds (default false).

runId.description: Run identifier returned by run_tests; pass to get_test_results.

section.description: set_project_setting: ini section name; bare names are normalized to /Script/<Section> and written to DefaultEngine.ini. get_project_settings: accepted but ignored (a fixed summary is returned).

sinceSeq.description: get_log/tail_log: return only lines with seq > this (incremental polling; response carries nextSeq + dropped).

spec.description: run_tests suite:"ui-nav": single spec to run, by name or filename (e.g. "pause_menu"); omit to run every spec in tests/ui-nav.

suite.description: run_tests: "ui-nav" runs the checked-in CommonUI focus/nav spec suite (tests/ui-nav) via the external pwsh runner, fire-and-poll like run_ubt; omit for engine automation tests. Needs pwsh on PATH and an idle editor.

target.description: run_ubt: build target (e.g. MyProjectEditor). Non-blocking: returns a buildId immediately; poll get_build_status.

test.description: Exact/partial test name to run (run_tests; alias for filter).

testName.description: generate_test_stub: the registered test path, e.g. 'Combat.DamageApplies' (also the run_tests filter).

value.description: set_cvar: value to set (omit to log the cvar's current value); set_project_setting: value written to the config key.

verbosity.description: get_log/tail_log: minimum severity to include — Fatal|Error|Warning|Display|Log|Verbose|VeryVerbose (default Verbose = all).

name: system_control
